title: selago flanaganii
intro: Selago flanaganii is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as a blue mountain-sage or mountain-sage. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Selago flanaganii may include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
